message:
feat(web): add mock data fallback indicator and toast notifications

Hooks (useDCG, useFleet, useSnapshot):
- Add usingMockData boolean to query result to indicate when fallback data is shown
- Show toast.warning when API fails and mock fallback is used
- Only use mock fallback when allowMockFallback is true (dev mode preference)

history.service.ts:
- Wrap json_set result in CAST(... AS BLOB) to match Drizzle's blob({ mode: "json" })
  column type. SQLite can return json_set as TEXT which causes Drizzle's blob-json
  decoder to throw. BLOB ensures consistent bytes read/write.

New components:
- MockDataBanner.tsx: UI banner to show when mock data is being displayed
- useMockFallback.ts: Hook to check if mock fallback is allowed

CSS additions:
- Styles for mock data banner warning state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
